name: Signal Processing Usability Registry
summary: Family-local interpretation of canonical usability reasons for sampled-signal pipelines.
dejargonized_summary: This registry explains when signal-processing artifacts are ready for guidance, scoring, or final benchmarking.

admissibility_notes: Use when a required waveform, event stream, or sampling context is unavailable.
escalation_conditions: Escalate when the missing input prevents a concrete candidate from being evaluated.
family_notes: In signal workflows this often means a required waveform, reference stream, or sampling rate is absent.

references.title: Heuristic usability assessment plan
references.citation: Phase 2 registry layer for reusable usability decisions.

admissibility_notes: Use when a waveform or derived quality score varies enough to make one fixed path brittle.
escalation_conditions: Escalate when local quality changes enough that one fixed path is likely to fail on part of the window.
family_notes: The shared usability meaning stays generic; the family note explains the waveform-specific reading.

references.title: Heuristic evidence layer plan
references.citation: Repository plan for cross-family usability interpretation.
references.note: Shared usability meaning with local signal-processing interpretation.

admissibility_notes: Use when the waveform and its event markers do not share a coherent time base.
escalation_conditions: Escalate when timing context cannot be aligned without changing the meaning of the artifact.
family_notes: In signal workflows this can mean the waveform and event stream disagree about the same time axis.

references.title: Heuristic usability implementation plan
references.citation: Cross-family usability registry design and rollout plan.
references.note: Timing coherence is a general usability issue, not a signal-only rule.

audit.rationale: Captures family-local interpretation of canonical usability reasons without redefining their meaning.
audit.dejargonized_summary: These are the generic warning signs that matter when deciding whether a signal-processing artifact is usable for guidance, scoring, or final benchmarking.
uncertainty_notes: Family guidance should remain local and should not redefine the shared usability identifiers.
